name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: Irving, TX's First Cash Pawn at 1449 N Belt Line Rd offers pawn loans, buying, and selling of jewelry, electronics, and collectibles.
description_long:
First Cash Pawn at 1449 N Belt Line Rd in Irving, TX is a standalone pawn shop in the heart of Irving's retail corridor. This location serves Irving residents and nearby communities with quick cash loans, buying, and selling of jewelry, electronics, collectibles, and other valuables. Open Monday through Saturday from 10 AM to 7 PM, and Sunday from 12 PM to 6 PM, it's conveniently located for Irving shoppers.

At this Irving location, you can pawn items for immediate cash, sell valuables outright, or browse inventory for deals on electronics, jewelry, and collectibles. The staff specializes in fair appraisals and competitive offers. For questions about what items they accept or for appraisal inquiries, call +1 972-790-4589.

Irving residents often visit First Cash Pawn when they need quick cash or want to buy quality secondhand items. Bring a valid ID and the items you wish to pawn or sell. This Irving pawn shop handles transactions quickly and discreetly, making it a trusted resource for TX residents.
address: 1449 N Belt Line Rd, Irving, TX 75061

company_info.headquarters: 1449 N Belt Line Rd, Irving, TX 75061

pros: Leading international operator with 3,300+ locations providing accessibility across 29 U.S. states and multiple countries
Non-recourse pawn loans—customers cannot be pursued for additional debt beyond loss of collateral if unable to repay
Immediate cash payment on the spot for items sold or pawned, with no credit check required
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000 Index component) indicating transparency and regulatory oversight
Wide acceptance of diverse merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, appliances, sporting goods)
Integrated retail marketplace allows customers to buy items alongside borrowing, creating a one-stop financial and shopping venue
Subsidiary AFF provides lease-to-own alternatives through 15,000+ retail partners, expanding financing options beyond pawn loans
cons: Interest rates, loan terms, and fees are not disclosed on the public website, preventing transparent comparison before visiting a store
Customers must surrender personal property during the loan period, creating risk of sentimental or essential item loss
Pawn loans are short-term solutions and do not build credit history, making them ineffective for addressing underlying credit constraints
Layaway service charges 10% down upfront with additional fees likely, reducing accessibility for those with severe cash constraints
No mention of financial counseling, education, or alternative pathways despite serving credit-constrained consumers
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash ($100-$5,000+) with valuable items they can temporarily surrender as collateral
Customers who do not qualify for traditional credit or payday loans and want to avoid debt-based borrowing
People seeking to buy merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools) at discounted prices from pawn inventory
Those with sporadic income or gig work who need short-term liquidity without credit inquiries or debt obligations
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for individuals with immediate, short-term cash needs ($100-$5,000+) who have valuable items to pledge as collateral and lack access to traditional credit. The primary caveat is that pawn loans do not build credit, do not solve underlying financial constraints, and require surrendering personal property—making this suitable only for temporary liquidity gaps, not long-term financial stability or credit repair.
services: Pawn loans secured by pledged personal property (non-recourse)
Gold, silver, and precious metal buying for immediate cash
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Layaway services with 10% down payment option
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through AFF subsidiary (15,000+ merchant partners)
Point-of-sale payment solutions for consumer goods
Online store locator to find nearest of 3,300+ locations
Cash payment on the spot for items purchased or pawned
Inventory browsing and shopping across retail locations
Consumer lending to cash and credit-constrained individuals without credit requirements
meta_description: First Cash Pawn at 1449 N Belt Line Rd, Irving, TX offers fast pawn loans and fair prices for jewelry, electronics, and more.
